src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Jojoaddison.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Jojoaddison.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Java EE/Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Jojoaddison.general_idea: Update JHipster constants import from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster to match the new JHipster 8 package structure.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Jojoaddison.why_exists: The io.github.jhipster package is removed in JHipster 8; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/aop/logging.general_idea: Update import path for JHipster configuration constants to match the new package structure in JHipster 8.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/aop/logging.why_exists: The class io.github.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants does not exist in JHipster 8; it has been moved to tech.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cons.general_idea: Add a constant for email validation regex pattern.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.general_idea: Update JHipster import paths from the old io.github.jhipster namespace to the new tech.jhipster namespace.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.why_exists: The old io.github.jhipster packages are removed in JHipster 8, causing compilation errors due to missing classes.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.general_idea: Remove the deprecated Mongobee database migration library bean configuration.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.why_exists: Mongobee is no longer supported or included in JHipster 8; the class com.github.mongobee.Mongobee is missing, causing compilation failure.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.general_idea: Remove the deprecated Elasticsearch repository enablement annotation.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.why_exists: The EnableElasticsearchRepositories annotation and associated infrastructure are removed or changed in JHipster 8, causing compilation errors if the old API is used without the new setup.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to the removed Mongobee and Elasticsearch configurations.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.why_exists: The classes MongoClient, MongoProperties, MongoTemplate, and Mongobee are no longer used in the class body, leading to unused import warnings or errors depending on compiler settings.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.general_idea: Remove the unused SLF4J logger field and imports.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.why_exists: The logger was only used in the removed Mongobee bean method; keeping it results in an unused field warning.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Defa.general_idea: Update the import path for JHipster constants to reflect the package rename in JHipster 8.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Defa.why_exists: The class io.github.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants does not exist in JHipster 8; it has been moved to tech.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.general_idea: Remove imports for Zalando Problem modules that are no longer used in the class.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.why_exists: Unused imports cause compilation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and the classes are removed from the source.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.general_idea: Remove the bean definition for ProblemModule.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.why_exists: The class ProblemModule is no longer imported or used, so keeping the bean definition would cause a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.why_exists: The class ConstraintViolationProblemModule is no longer imported or used, so keeping the bean definition would cause a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Loca.general_idea: Replace JHipster-specific AngularCookieLocaleResolver with standard Spring CookieLocaleResolver to remove framework-specific dependency.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Loca.why_exists: The class io.github.jhipster.config.locale.AngularCookieLocaleResolver is removed in JHipster 8, causing a compile error if the import and usage are retained.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Loca.general_idea: Replace wildcard import with specific imports for WebMvcConfigurer and InterceptorRegistry to adhere to modern coding standards.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Logg.why_exists: The method jHipsterProperties.getMetrics().getLogs() or the associated filter setup is incompatible or removed in the target JHipster/Spring Boot version, causing compilation or runtime errors.
